'''pamafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feavour|feavour]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feavour|feavour]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pamafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæmæfæth|pæmæfæth]] || [[word:pæmæfæj|pæmæfæj]] || [[word:pæmæfæsh|pæmæfæsh]] || [[word:pæmæfæ|pæmæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pamamafath|pamamafath]] || [[word:pamamafaj|pamamafaj]] || [[word:pamamafash|pamamafash]] || [[word:pamamafa|pamamafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pamafath|pamafath]] || [[word:pamafaj|pamafaj]] || [[word:pamafash|pamafash]] || [[word:pamafa|pamafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pamaffath|pamaffath]] || [[word:pamaffaj|pamaffaj]] || [[word:pamaffash|pamaffash]] || [[word:pamaffaf|pamaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pamafatha|pamafatha]] || [[word:pamafaja|pamafaja]] || [[word:pamafasha|pamafasha]] || [[word:pamafaka|pamafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pamafath|pamafath]] || [[word:pamafaj|pamafaj]] || [[word:pamafash|pamafash]] || [[word:pamafa|pamafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pamafathal|pamafathal]] || [[word:pamafajal|pamafajal]] || [[word:pamafashal|pamafashal]] || [[word:pamafakal|pamafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pamafathatha|pamafathatha]] || [[word:pamafajaja|pamafajaja]] || [[word:pamafashasha|pamafashasha]] || [[word:pamafaka|pamafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pamafathan|pamafathan]] || [[word:pamafajan|pamafajan]] || [[word:pamafashan|pamafashan]] || [[word:pamafakan|pamafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pamafathaoro|pamafathaoro]] || [[word:pamafajaoro|pamafajaoro]] || [[word:pamafashaoro|pamafashaoro]] || [[word:pamafakaoro|pamafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
